2605.23883.title: PGT: Procedurally Generated Tasks for improving visual grounding in MLLMs
2605.23883.paper_summary: Despite remarkable progress in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), these models still struggle with fine-grained understanding tasks. In this work, we propose Procedurally Generated Tasks (PGT), a simple data-driven framework that serves a dual purpose: inducing fine-grained visual understanding and acting as a low-cost diagnostic tool to identify the source of perception failures. By overlaying unambiguous geometric primitives on images, PGT generate additional dense supervision that disentangles visual grounding capability from semantic priors. Extensive experiments on relational, quantitative, and 3D/depth understanding benchmarks show that PGT yields remarkable gains across diverse architectures. Instruction tuning MLLMs on LLaVA-v1.5-Instruct augmented with PGT data results in improvements of up to +20% on the What'sUp benchmark and +13.3% on CV-Bench-2D, while maintaining general perception capabilities. Moreover, finetuning state-of-the-art MLLMs on PGT data leads to boosts of up to +5.5% on What'sUp and +8.3% on CV-Bench-2D. These findings demonstrate that PGT effectively address the bottleneck of fine-grained perception, revealing that many spatial reasoning deficits stem from inadequate supervision signals rather than inherent architectural or resolution limitations.
2605.23883.paper_summary_zh: 儘管多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在某些方面取得了顯著進展，但這些模型在細緻理解任務上仍然面臨挑戰。在本研究中，我們提出了程序生成任務（PGT），這是一個簡單的數據驅動框架，具有雙重目的：促進細緻的視覺理解並作為一種低成本的診斷工具，以識別感知失敗的來源。通過在圖像上疊加明確的幾何原件，PGT 生成額外的密集監督，從而將視覺基礎能力與語義先驗分離。對關係、定量和 3D/深度理解基準的廣泛實驗顯示，PGT 在各種架構中產生了顯著的增益。在 LLaVA-v1.5-Instruct 上對 MLLMs 進行指令調整，並增強 PGT 數據，導致在 What'sUp 基準上提高了高達 +20% 的性能，在 CV-Bench-2D 上提高了 +13.3%，同時保持一般的感知能力。此外，對最先進的 MLLMs 在 PGT 數據上進行微調，導致在 What'sUp 上提高了高達 +5.5%，在 CV-Bench-2D 上提高了 +8.3%。這些發現表明，PGT 有效地解決了細緻感知的瓶頸，揭示了許多空間推理缺陷源於不充分的監督信號，而非固有的架構或解析度限制。
2605.23883.author: Rim Assouel et.al.
2605.23883.authors: Rim Assouel, Amir Bar, Michal Drozdzal, Adriana Romero-Soriano
